title: Locked Out of Home
scene: 你把钥匙忘在家里，门锁了，叫锁匠。

turns.cn: 锁匠，什么地址？什么锁？
turns.en: Locksmith service. What's the address and lock type?

turns.cn: 枫树街88号，标准死锁，钥匙在里面。
turns.en: Eighty-eight Maple Street. Standard deadbolt. Keys are inside.

turns.cn: 二十五分钟到，请出示ID和住址证明。
turns.en: Twenty-five minutes. I'll need ID and proof you live there.

turns.cn: 费用大概多少？
turns.en: About how much will it cost?

turns.cn: 白天开锁九十到一百二，现金刷卡都行。
turns.en: Ninety to a hundred twenty daytime. Cash or card.

turns.cn: 好的，我在门口等。
turns.en: Okay. I'll wait at the door.

turns.cn: 到了会打电话，别自己撬锁。
turns.en: I'll call when I arrive. Don't try to pick it yourself.

title: Rekey Locks
scene: 你刚搬新家，请锁匠换锁芯。

turns.cn: 想换锁芯，前后门各一把。
turns.en: I'd like to rekey the locks. Front and back door.

turns.cn: 同一钥匙开两把吗？
turns.en: One key for both locks?

turns.cn: 对，另外做两把备用钥匙。
turns.en: Yes, and two spare keys.

turns.cn: 一共一百六，半小时搞定。
turns.en: A hundred sixty total. About thirty minutes.

turns.cn: 锁本身不用换吧？
turns.en: I don't need new lock hardware, right?

turns.cn: 不用，换芯就行，旧钥匙作废。
turns.en: No, just new pins. Old keys won't work.

turns.cn: 请现在开始吧。
turns.en: Please go ahead.

title: Car Lockout
scene: 你把车钥匙锁在车里，停车场叫锁匠。

turns.cn: 钥匙锁车里了，丰田凯美瑞，商场停车场。
turns.en: My keys are locked in my Camry at the mall parking lot.

turns.cn: 车牌和车位区域？
turns.en: License plate and parking section?

turns.cn: ABC5678，B区三层。
turns.en: ABC5678, level three, section B.

turns.cn: 十五分钟到，请站在车旁。
turns.en: Fifteen minutes. Stand by the car.

turns.cn: 会刮花车门吗？
turns.en: Will you scratch the door?

turns.cn: 用气囊撑开，专业工具，不留痕。
turns.en: We use a wedge and pro tools. No damage.

turns.cn: 太好了，谢谢。
turns.en: Great. Thank you.

title: Smart Lock Install
scene: 你请锁匠安装智能门锁。

turns.cn: 智能锁带来了吗？门厚度量过吗？
turns.en: Did you bring the smart lock? Have you measured the door?

turns.cn: 在这，标准木门，要连手机。
turns.en: Here it is. Standard wood door. I want phone access.

turns.cn: 安装加设置一百八，含教程。
turns.en: Install and setup is a hundred eighty, including a walkthrough.

turns.cn: 没电了怎么进？
turns.en: What if the battery dies?

turns.cn: 备用钥匙和USB应急供电口。
turns.en: Physical key backup and a USB emergency port.

turns.cn: 能设临时密码给客人吗？
turns.en: Can I set temporary codes for guests?

turns.cn: 可以，装完我教您。
turns.en: Yes. I'll show you after install.

title: Broken Key
scene: 你的钥匙断在门锁里，求助锁匠。

turns.cn: 钥匙断在锁芯里了，门打不开。
turns.en: The key broke off in the lock. I can't open the door.

turns.cn: 有钥匙另一半吗？
turns.en: Do you have the other half?

turns.cn: 有，在这。
turns.en: Yes, here it is.

turns.cn: 我先取断片，看锁芯要不要换。
turns.en: I'll extract the piece first and see if the cylinder needs replacing.

turns.cn: 取不出来要换整把锁吗？
turns.en: If it won't come out, do I need a new lock?

turns.cn: 多数能取出，最坏情况换芯八十。
turns.en: Usually we get it. Worst case, new cylinder is eighty.

turns.cn: 请尽量保留原锁。
turns.en: Please try to keep the original lock.
